comments.body: Javadoc is not the right place for documenting Gradle use, in my opinion. This should be in the README or a similar but dedicated file named something appropriate (e.g., "BUILD.md"). Also, if possible, it may be better to have the "start client" task depend on the runData task.

And keep in mind that Gradle, or any other build tool, should only be used during development. If the end user needs to do something before starting the client then you need to include that in the documentation shipped with your application (Javadoc is for developers, not end users).

title: Is it possible to link/run Gradle tasks in comments in IntelliJ Idea?
body:
I am using IntelliJ Idea with Gradle. Take for example:

/**
 *  Make sure to run the runData configuration before starting the client
 */

could runData there be substituted for something clickable/linked to the task?
